title: Air Wick Cherry Blossom & Raspberry Liquid Electrical Triple Refill 19ml, Lasts for up to 100 days per refill, Air Freshener
features: Fill your room with amazing fragrances for a warm and welcoming environment
Lush aroma of cherry blossom and juicy raspberries with notes of violet leaf, whipped sugar and warm woods to bring a touch of sophistication
Infused with 2x more essential oils* (*vs existing Air Wick Plug-In Refills)
Amazing fragrance for up to 100 days* per refill (*lowest setting for 12hr usage / day)
description: Product Description Air Wick Electrical Plug-In Refill infused with 2x more essential oils* for amazing fragrance that fills your room. Each refill lasts for up to 100 days** (*vs existing Air Wick Plug-In Refills; **12 hr/day on lowest setting). Air Freshener. Airwick. Ingredients Contains: Dipropylene glycol monomethyl ether, 2-T-BUTYLCYCLOHEXYL ACETATE, BENZYL ACETATE, MIXED IONONES, ETHYL METHYLPHENYLGLYCIDATE, LINALOOL, D-LIMONENE, Ethyl maltol, Tetramethyl acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, lpha,alphaDimethylphenethyl butyrate, METHOXYTRIMETHYLHEPTANOL, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE, Oils, lemon, CITRONELLOL, ETHYL 3-PHENYLGLYCIDATE, Formaldehyde cyclododecyl ethyl acetal, 2-Methyl-4-(2,2,3-trimethyl3-cyclopenten-1-yl)-2-buten1-ol, TRANS-ROSE KETONE-2, 2,6-Dimethyl-5-heptenal, ROSE KETONE-4, 2,4-DIMETHYL3-CYCLOHEXENE CARBOXALDEHYDE, 3-(4-isobutyl2-methylphenyl)propanal, Lemon, ext., DIMETHYLHYDROXY FURANONE, METHYL OCTINE CARBONATE
